name: language-log-plus
description: Log syntax highlighting with an inline filter panel

showFilterBar.title: Show filter bar
showFilterBar.description: Automatically show the log filter panel when the active editor uses the Log grammar.

tail.title: Tail file changes
tail.description: Keep the editor scrolled to the bottom when the log buffer changes.

caseInsensitive.title: Case insensitive filter
caseInsensitive.description: Match filter text regardless of letter case.

adjacentLines.title: Adjacent visible lines
adjacentLines.description: Keep this many lines visible before and after each text filter match.

foldPosition.title: Fold position
foldPosition.description: Choose where folded hidden lines are anchored in the editor.

enum.description: At the end of the line before the hidden block.
Between the visible lines around the hidden block.

useMultiLinesLogEntrySupport.title: Use multi-line log entry support
useMultiLinesLogEntrySupport.description: Treat timestamped multi-line entries as one filterable log record. Experimental.
